events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes torquing rubber bushings at full droop (TRD - preload error). This is a known issue in suspension work - rubber bushings should be torqued at ride height (normal ride position), not at full droop. When torqued at full droop, the bushing is preloaded in an unnatural position, which will cause premature wear, binding, and failure.

This is a clear fail - the bushings are installed but torqued incorrectly, creating a preload error that will damage the bushings.

Let me construct the JSON response.

  "rationale": "Rubber bushings must be final-torqued at normal ride height so the rubber is in a neutral stress state. Torquing at full droop locks the bushing in an extended position; once the vehicle is lowered, the bushing is permanently preloaded, leading to binding, accelerated wear, ride-height deviation, and altered caster/camber. This is a non-compliant installation requiring rework before closeout.",
